case_title: JUAN ADOLFO RUIZ GARCIA VS. JACOB GRALNIK

docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO COMPEL POST JUDGMENT DISCOVERY RESPONSES AND AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GARCIA, JUAN ADOLFO RUIZ C/O INSTITUTO LABORAL DE LA RAZA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRALNIK, JACOB AN INDIVIDUAL DBA E-CONSTRUCTION & PLUMBING CO $3,857.64 PRINCIPAL, $51.72 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,089.36, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL ON ORDER GRANTING MTN TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO POST-JUDGMENT DISCOVERY; AND FOR AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS FILED BY ASSIGNEE CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC. DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU

NTC OF MTN TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO POST-JUDGMENT DISCOVERY; AND FOR AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY ASSIGNEE CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC. DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU HEARING SET FOR DEC-10-2008 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 610

DISCOVERY 610, ASSIGNEE CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO POST JUDGMENT DISCOVERY IS GRANTED. MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $340 SHALL BE PAID WITHIN 21 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE CHAN. NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-10-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Assignee Creditors Trade association, Inc.'s motion to compel responses to post judgment discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections and produce documents within 21 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $340 shall be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
